summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of MiniMax Trading Agent platform. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly. Authentication, navigation, data integration, and real-time updates all verified.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login with correct credentials (admin/minimax123) returns ok:true
POST /api/auth/login with wrong credentials returns ok:false
GET /api/health returns services and components status
GET /api/data returns dashboard data (day_pnl, trades, open_positions, pnl_curve, daily_pnl)
GET /api/risk returns risk controls (daily_loss_limit, loss_pct, drawdown, trading_allowed)
GET /api/strategies returns strategies list with status
GET /api/logs returns event_logs from MongoDB
GET /api/audit returns 14 issues all FIXED
GET /api/config returns trading parameters (portfolio_value, max_risk_pct)
GET /api/fo/calculate with entry=22000&sl=21950&target=22100 returns qty, risk, reward
GET /api/premarket returns indices and movers data
Frontend login page loads with username/password fields
Frontend login works with admin/minimax123 credentials
Dashboard page shows Day P&L, Trades Today, Win Rate, Portfolio Value stat cards
Navigation to System Health page shows component health and risk summary
Navigation to Risk Dashboard page shows daily loss meter and risk rules
Navigation to Audit & Logs shows 14 issues all FIXED
Navigation to Settings shows trading parameters and system info
Navigation to Trade Log shows recent trades with filter functionality
Navigation to F&O Calculator allows calculation and displays results
Navigation to Premarket Scanner with refresh functionality
All navigation menu items work correctly
Real-time data updates (clock and live indicators)
Topbar shows NSE status, Day P&L, and trading mode
Login error handling for wrong credentials
Professional UI design and responsive layout
